zh.lifeSummary: 當Aline Basset於1182年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆時，她的父親Sir Alan Basset27歲，母親Aline de Gai23歲。她於大約1214年與Richard de Talbot III在英國英格蘭賀福爾林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1224年在英國英格蘭賀福爾布洛米亞德享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aline Basset于1182年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆时，她的父亲Sir Alan Basset27岁，母亲Aline de Gai23岁。她于大约1214年与Richard de Talbot III在英国英格兰賀福爾林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1224年在英国英格兰賀福爾布洛米亞德享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Aline Basset was born in 1182, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Alan Basset, was 27 and her mother, Aline de Gai, was 23. She married Richard de Talbot III about 1214, in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1224, in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aline Basset est née en 1182, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Basset, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aline de Gai, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Talbot III environ 1214, à Linton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1224, à Bromyard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aline Basset 1182 in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan Basset 27 und ihre Mutter Aline de Gai 23. Sie hat um 1214 in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard de Talbot III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aline Basset è nata il nel 1182 nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Alan Basset, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Aline de Gai, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Talbot III circa 1214, nel Linton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1224, nel Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aline Bassetが1182年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Bassetは27歳，母Aline de Gaiは23歳であった。約1214年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリントンでRichard de Talbot IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1224年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブロムヤルドで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aline Basset(이)가 1182년 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan Basset(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Gai(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 린턴에서 Richard de Talbot III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 브로미아어드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aline Basset nasceu em 1182, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Basset, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Gai, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Talbot III aproximadamente 1214, em Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1224, em Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aline Basset родилась в 1182 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan Basset было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Gai, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Talbot III около 1214 г. в местности линтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1224 г. в местности бромярд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aline Basset nació en 1182, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Basset, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aline de Gai, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard de Talbot III aproximadamente 1214, en Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1224, en Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
